# Aleksei Bespechnyi – Full Profile

## Introduction
Aleksei Bespechnyi, Marketing Manager turned International Sales & Business Development professional. 
Bachelor student in Global Sales & Marketing (final semester, FH Steyr). 
Based in Linz, Austria, open to work across DACH region and remotely.

## My Mindset
Marketing can attract attention. But real success happens when attention turns into clients, and clients into revenue. 
During my internship I optimized the entire funnel and improved conversion – that was the turbo. 
My core focus is on the engine: international sales and business development. 
I find and open new markets, build conversations with international clients, understand their needs and adapt the offer so that interest turns into concrete revenue. 
Marketing is not an end in itself, but a strategic tool for client acquisition.

## Key Results (partyboss.at)
- Organic Social: sessions grew from 25 to 149 (+496%), engagement rate from 60% to 80.5%.
- Organic Search: sessions grew from 383 to 858 (+124%), engagement rate from 59% to 70.6%.
- Built sales and digital visibility from scratch for the new brand.
- Testimonial from Sascha Reischl, CEO Roll Out Innovation GmbH:
  "Aleksei proved in just three months that he understands digital marketing. The numbers speak for themselves: almost 500% more organic visibility and significantly higher interaction rates. He works independently, thinks strategically, and delivers results. Exactly the kind of employee we were looking for."

## Skills
- International Sales
- Business Development
- CRM & Cold Outreach
- Market Research
- Marketing Automation
- SEO & Content Marketing
- Meta Ads
- Google Analytics

## Social Initiatives
Supports Roll Out Innovation GmbH's social projects (Zukunft Jugend brand): 
increasing reach for zukunft-jugend.at and sascha-reischl.at/veranstaltungen, focusing on youth projects MobileJULEI and DriveJUZ.

## What I'm Looking For
Seeking a company that genuinely wants to grow internationally and understands that sales is more than just filling a CRM. 
I offer a combination of analytical marketing thinking and hands-on sales experience: someone who turns attention into revenue.
Open for: International Sales, Business Development, International Projects, Client Acquisition.
